description: Left side of a letter sent by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (fl. 1100-1138 CE) to his brother in law, in which the sender writes that Eli had served the Tala'i', and asking the recipient to send him a mantle for his shoulders. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, 47, 518, and from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
